item.title: Fremantle coach Justin Longmuir lifts lid on Wharfie Time button that ‘spooks the opposition’
item.description: ‘It clearly helps us as a team.’

item.title: Federal budget 2026: Government responds as call for boost to Centrelink payments goes unheard
item.description: An advisory committee identified a ‘critical need’ among recipients for the increase.

item.title: 'Rough is pretty gnarly': Golfers brace for major test at PGA Championship in Pennsylvania
item.description: Six Aussies are in the field and expecting a fierce challenge in the second major of the year.

item.title: Australian Test batter Marcus North explains decision to become England selector
item.description: The 46-year-old Melburnian’s use of one interesting word will not go unnoticed back home.

item.title: Russia bombards Ukrainian capital Kyiv during ‘massive attack’ from drones and missiles
item.description: The missile and drone attack struck buildings in different districts of the city, including in residential areas.

item.title: AFL great Mark Williams lands career-first AFLW role at Hawthorn after Melbourne sacking
item.description: The veteran is back at the top level after his former team’s unpopular decision to swing the axe.

item.title: Federal Budget 2026-27: Tax, migration, NDIS in coalition’s economic sights as Angus Taylor gives budget reply
item.description: ‘This is generational tax reform. It’s fair, simple, and honest.’

item.title: Nationwide free RSV vaccine program for pregnant women cuts baby hospitalisations by half
item.description: ‘Before the immunisation was introduced, we would see one in 50 babies being hospitalised.’

item.title: Denmark’s former queen Margrethe hospitalised for ‘heart spasm’
item.description: Denmark’s royal court has issued a health update.

item.title: Aussie Min Woo Lee claims early share of PGA Championship lead as Jason Day and Cameron Smith fall short
item.description: Major winners were furious on a difficult first day of the PGA Championship.

item.title: St Kilda veteran Bradley Hill recalls moment AFL passion disappeared: ‘I didn’t want to go out there’
item.description: ‘I haven’t really talked about this too much to people.’

item.title: Be quick: this 20 per cent off iPhone deal ends this Sunday
item.description: Optus is slashing $200 off the iPhone 17e, but the deal ends in just days, so this could be your last chance to lock in the savings.

item.title: South African golf star Garrick Higgo penalised for lateness at PGA Championship: ‘I am very casual’
item.description: The 27-year-old pleaded his case for leniency while knowing he only had himself to blame.

item.title: Janine Allis’ Boost Juice steps in to support four Gold Coast stores which shut amid franchise fallout
item.description: The outlets shut without notice after the franchisee behind them collapsed over an alleged unpaid tax debt.

item.title: Gold Coast teenager charged after alleged e-bike group taunted police at Runaway Bay Sports Complex
item.description: Police allege the 13-year-old was part of a group throwing rocks at officers, damaging park facilities and posting videos of the incidents online.

item.title: ACCC investigates retailers over ‘manipulative tactics’ in Black Friday sales
item.description: Investigators say shoppers were falsely lured into not-so-unmissable deals.

item.title: Extension on fuel excise relief kept in play as Anthony Albanese says Australia has more petrol than before Iran war
item.description: Australia now has 44 days’ worth of petrol and more than when the Iran war broke out.

item.title: Much-loved Tamworth trainer Stephen Meyer dies in ‘absolutely awful incident’
item.description: The racing industry has been rocked by the sad and ‘horrible news’.

item.title: Former Supercars champion Scott McLaughlin flies during Indy Fast Friday practice
item.description: ‘It was better than going upside down.’

item.title: Esperanto: The international language you didn’t know existed
item.description: A nondescript house in the centre of Sydney is housing a global secret.

item.title: Rank outsider Rothfire pulls off Group 1 ‘fairytale’ to win $1.5m Doomben 10,000
item.description: Redemption was sweet as the champion horse got back on top six years after his only other Group 1 triumph.

item.title: Australian family travelling the world with their three kids in Kombi van ‘ultimate adventure’
item.description: ‘The world is their classroom and you can’t replicate that in a book.’

item.title: Matildas striker Holly McNamara’s world-class goal delivers record-equalling fifth A-League title for Manchester City
item.description: The 23-year-old produced a masterclass to lead her side to victory in the grand final.

item.title: The Issue: Housing minister Clare O’Neil sits down for 7NEWS podcast to talk about negative gearing, capital gains tax changes
item.description: Clare O’Neil boasts she is leading ‘the most ambitious Australian agenda on housing that a government has had in this country for 70 years’.

item.title: Kmart and Target recall walkie-talkies over frequency blunder
item.description: The popular toys, sold in Kmart and Target, can be returned in-store for a full refund.

item.title: Socceroos hero Cammy Devlin and Hearts teammates leave stadium after ‘shameful’ pitch invasion
item.description: Minutes after losing the title decider, the Aussie and his team had to escape from a ‘deeply disturbing’ attack.

item.title: Cameron Smith rockets into contention at PGA Championship after gut-wrenching split with lifelong coach
item.description: The Aussie star has rediscovered some of his best form at the PGA Championship after a ‘tough’ week personally.

item.title: Emotional scenes as Matildas superstar Sam Kerr farewells Chelsea in style
item.description: The departing superstar scored another stunning goal before receiving a standing ovation.

item.title: America expands online vetting with temporary visa applicants instructed to open social media profiles
item.description: Some applicants are being instructed to make their social media accounts public.

item.title: UFC legend Ronda Rousey needs just 17 seconds to win comeback fight over Gina Carano
item.description: The 39-year-old ended the bout with her signature move in the first round.

item.title: Ukraine war: NATO forces test new UGV drones amid fears Russia may invade Latvia
item.description: 7NEWS was invited to a war games exercise held as NATO faces threats not only from its enemies but also from within.

item.title: What exactly are the laws of war? International Humanitarian Law explained as alleged war crime breaches mount in the Middle East
item.description: Here is everything you need to know about the laws of war, and why people break them.

item.title: Alex Marquez and Johann Zarco rushed to hospital after horror crashes at Catalan Grand Prix
item.description: The race was red-flagged twice as rival riders and medical staff rushed to their aid.

item.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak an international health emergency as virus kills dozens
item.description: The World Health Organisation has addressed pandemic concerns.

item.title: Cameron Smith falls painfully short at PGA Championship as Aaron Rai wins first major
item.description: The Aussie star enjoyed a return to form at the year’s second major but it wasn’t enough.

item.title: At least four people killed in Moscow as Ukraine launches retaliatory drone strikes
item.description: ‘We are clearly telling the Russians: Their state must end its war.’

item.title: Israeli strikes kill at least eight people in Gaza
item.description: ‘We have Hamas in our grip’: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu says Israeli forces have expanded their control over Gaza.

item.title: Alec Baldwin taunts Elon Musk amid ‘racist’ casting backlash over The Odyssey role
item.description: The Tesla billionaire has taken issue with Lupita Nyong’o starring as a heroine of Greek mythology.

item.title: Gold Coast toddler Dusty Wildman’s accident leads to nationwide cake decorating powder recall
item.description: The substance had formed a dangerous sludge-like mass inside the young boy’s lungs.

item.title: Holly Valance declares herself ‘absolutely right-wing’ at London anti-immigration rally
item.description: The former Neighbours star urged Australians to stand up for the country.

item.title: Trapped 91yo man rescued after earthquake brought down buildings, killing two people, in China
item.description: More than a dozen buildings crumbled and thousands were sent running for their lives.

item.title: Investigation launched after shocked Esperance couple find live frog in bag of Woolworths lettuce
item.description: A couple got a little more than they paid for in a sealed bag of Woolies lettuce. SEE THE VIDEO

item.title: TV star and former model Katie Price claims husband Lee Andrews has been ‘kidnapped’ in Dubai
item.description: Katie Price’s final contact with the 43-year-old came as he was trying to board a flight to the UK.

item.title: Police outnumbered as hundreds of teen e-bike riders flood Brisbane inner-city streets
item.description: Frustrated Brisbane motorists say the teenagers treated the CBD like their ‘personal playground’.

item.description: ‘We felt unsafe most of the way.’

item.title: Experts push for subsidised weight loss drugs to prevent heart attacks
item.description: ‘You don’t have to be the heaviest person to get benefit from this type of medication.’

item.title: Heartless thieves steal custom bike from Perth schoolboy living with disability
item.description: The $5000 bike is just one of five in Australia and offers vital independence.

item.title: Five dead after hate crime shooting at Islamic Centre in San Diego as teen gunmen identified
item.description: Police were already looking for one of the teenagers before the attack.

item.title: Trump pauses scheduled ‘large-scale assault’ on Iran at request of Gulf allies
item.description: The President said he had instructed the US military ‘to be prepared’ to go ahead with the attack at a moment’s notice.

item.description: A major decision by the Trump administration has come under fire as the crisis unfolds.

item.description: After 12 seasons in the NBA, Joe Ingles has made an ‘incredibly special’ decision.

item.description: ‘We buried him 50 years ago, only to find out 50 years later that these people had stolen his brain.’

item.title: Elon Musk filed his lawsuit against OpenAI too late, and a US jury has ruled against him
item.description: The jury deliberated less than two hours and it was a unanimous verdict.

item.description: ‘It’s not on the dark web.’

item.description: Five perished at the cave diving site, as recovery plans continue.

item.description: ‘It’s like part of my youth is dying,’ one patron said.

item.description: Born out of online forums for incels in the 2010s, ‘looksmaxxing’ has taken the world by storm and doesn’t appear to be going anywhere anytime soon. Here’s what it actually means.

item.description: The new video from the Rolling Stones shows de-aged versions of Mick Jagger, Keith Richards and Ronnie Wood performing their song In The Stars.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Seafood product urgently recalled in multiple states; two dead in horror Melbourne crash
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Israeli forces intercept Gaza-bound flotilla in the Mediterranean after firing at the vessels
item.description: Video streamed live from the flotilla showed soldiers firing shots at two of the boats.

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz wiped out of another grand slam as world No.2 withdraws from Wimbledon
item.description: The world No.2 ‘will be missed’ as the tennis world waits to see if anyone else can challenge Jannik Sinner.

item.title: Trump threatens Iran with strikes while demanding nuclear deal
item.description: The US President has issued a chilling warning to Iran, threatening another ‘big hit’ while claiming they’re begging to negotiate. But will he follow through?

item.title: Arsenal crowned EPL champions after Man City fall short against Bournemouth
item.description: An impromptu late-night party broke out in London as a 22-year drought came to an end.

item.title: Writings of teen shooters reveal motivations for deadly San Diego Mosque attack
item.description: The ‘radicalised’ pair fatally shot three people before taking their own lives.

item.title: Carlton quietly settle with former list boss Nick Austin after five-minute ‘blindside’
item.description: The Blues bounced back on the field and now they’ve made another move after what wasn’t ‘a great week’ for the club.

item.title: Ebola outbreak kills dozens more as WHO raises alarm over epidemic’s ‘scale and speed’
item.description: The death toll has risen sharply with hundreds more contracting the virus.

item.title: Western Bulldogs could make call on injured skipper Marcus Bontempelli if things don’t improve
item.description: ‘It doesn’t look good.’

item.title: Mary Fowler to return to Matildas squad fresh off Manchester City’s Super League win
item.description: Some of Australia’s biggest names have returned but some familiar faces have missed out.

item.title: Kiwi international Briton Nikora shoots down eligibility critics ahead of Qld Origin debut
item.description: ‘That’s what I carry close to my heart.’

item.title: Volkswagen Golf GTI Edition 50: No birthday party for iconic hot hatch nameplate in Australia
item.description: VW's local product boss has ruled out the 239kW Golf GTI Edition 50 for Australia, despite our hunger for performance cars Down Under.

item.title: Two men charged over alleged card-skimming scam targeting ATMs and businesses across southeast Queensland
item.description: Search the full list below to see which areas are affected.

item.title: NRL enforcer Jai Arrow retires immediately after shock MND diagnosis
item.description: The 30-year-old is facing more tests but says ‘what I need right now isn’t sympathy or sadness’.

item.title: The Agenda Setters Stocks after R10: Buy, hold and sell
item.description: The Hawks champ was not happy with the king of hot takes and decided to let him know.

item.title: 860kW Mercedes-AMG GT EV revealed, confirmed for Australia
item.description: The first electric Mercedes-AMG on a new dedicated EV architecture packs up to 860kW and looks to win over fans of its V8 predecessor – and it’s headed for Australia.

item.title: Brisbane winger Deine Mariner eyes stunning return after having leg saved by emergency surgery
item.description: Deine Mariner was clearly surprised when he came out of emergency surgery and ‘saw my leg still there’.

item.title: More rain looms but worst is over after heavy rain and floods smash parts of Queensland and NSW
item.description: The clean-up is underway after wild weather which led to more than a dozen rescues from flash-flooding.

item.title: Brisbane ex-GP Stellios Theodoros faces nearly 150 sex assault charges spanning 15 years
item.description: Police allege the 74-year-old sexually assaulted women aged from their late teens to their 40s during appointments.

item.title: Honda Civic Type R orders to reopen in Australia despite mounting emissions pressure
item.description: Fresh stock of the Honda Civic Type R is due later this year, but prospective buyers will likely face another limited allocation.

item.title: Australian Olympic swimmer Neil Brooks and wife Linda overjoyed as fraud case dropped
item.description: The decorated swimmer and former TV star was ‘ecstatic’ when he got the good news.

item.title: Three teens arrested after alleged arsons across Melbourne’s CBD
item.description: Three teenagers have been arrested.

item.title: Star centre Stephen Crichton misses NSW’s first training session
item.description: Excited fans turned up to watch but the gun centre didn’t even warm up.

item.title: US President Donald Trump shielded from future tax investigations into sons and businesses under explosive deal
item.description: ‘A get-out-of-jail-free card negotiated with himself.’

item.title: Bentley carpark crash victim identified as Indian national studying in Perth
item.description: ‘I didn’t believe it. I thought it must be wrong.’

item.title: Snowtown murders: Court to decide if James Vlassakis will be granted parole
item.description: In newly surfaced videos, the now‑44‑year‑old speaks about his parole bid, saying he has ‘packed up (his) cell’.

item.title: Convicted paedophile and former magistrate Peter Liddy to be released on home detention
item.description: The former magistrate was convicted of sexually abusing four boys in the 1980s.

item.title: In-demand Port Adelaide free agent Zak Butters closing in on ‘pretty emotional’ contract decision
item.description: ‘I need to start having some conversations with family and friends.’

item.title: Boy's alleged plane hijack plan at Avalon Airport 'politically motivated', Melbourne court hears
item.description: The teen is accused of bringing a firearm and fake bomb onto a plane.

item.title: 2027 Volvo EX60 pricing: New electric SUV undercuts Audi, BMW rivals in Australia
item.description: Australian pricing for the Volvo EX60 has been announced, with two variants of the electric mid-size SUV to be offered at its launch in late 2026.

item.title: 2027 Volvo EX60 review: Quick drive
item.description: The all-new EX60 is the electric counterpart to Volvo's most popular model, but can it do the XC60 justice? Ben Zachariah went to Spain to find out.

item.title: Entry-level Volvo EX60, high-performance P12, Cross Country under evaluation
item.description: Volvo is considering a new entry-level EX60 variant, along with the high-performance P12 and the Cross Country soft-roader.

item.title: Manly vice-captain Jake Trbojevic to play on in 2027 after hitting contract trigger
item.description: The Sea Eagles’ heart-and-soul star has exercised an option in his contract.

item.title: ‘What a flaming flog’: Gold Coast man chases alleged fuel thief after spotting diesel being siphoned from truck
item.description: The accused culprit fled with the hose still attached, leaving diesel spilt across the road.
